title: te.exe
html:
te.exe

Testing tool included with Microsoft Test Authoring and Execution Framework (TAEF).

Execute

Execute Visual Basic script stored in local Windows Script Component file.

te.exe {PATH:.wsc}

Run COM Scriptlets (e.g. VBScript) by calling a Windows Script Component (WSC) file. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User

Execute DLL file.

te.exe {PATH:.dll}

Execute commands from a DLL file with Test Authoring and Execution Framework (TAEF) tests. See resources section for required structures. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
